name: Install-PSResource

options.name: -AcceptLicense
options.description: Specifies that the resource should accept any request to accept the license agreement. This suppresses prompting if the module mandates that a user accept the license agreement.

options.name: -AuthenticodeCheck
options.description: Validates Authenticode signatures and catalog files on Windows.

options.name: -Credential
options.description: Optional credentials used when accessing a repository.

name: -InputObject
-ParentResource
options.description: Used for pipeline input.

options.name: -Name
options.description: The name of one or more resources to install.

options.name: -NoClobber
options.description: Prevents installing a package that contains cmdlets that already exist on the machine.

options.name: -PassThru
options.description: When specified, outputs a PSResourceInfo object for the saved resource.

name: -Prerelease
-IsPrerelease
options.description: When specified, includes prerelease versions in search results returned.

options.name: -Quiet
options.description: Suppresses installation progress bar.

options.name: -Reinstall
options.description: Installs the latest version of a module even if the latest version is already installed. The installed version is overwritten. This allows you to repair a damaged installation of the module.

options.name: -Repository
options.description: Specifies one or more repository names to search. If not specified, search includes all registered repositories, in priority order (highest first), until a repository is found that contains the package. Repositories are sorted by priority then by name. Lower Priority values have a higher precedence.

options.name: -RequiredResource
options.description: A hashtable or JSON string that specifies resources to install. Wildcard characters aren't allowed. See the NOTES (#notes)section for a description of the file formats.

options.name: -RequiredResourceFile
options.description: Path to a `.psd1` or `.json` that specifies resources to install. Wildcard characters aren't allowed. See the NOTES (#notes)section for a description of the file formats.

options.name: -Scope
options.description: Specifies the installation scope. Accepted values are:

options.name: -SkipDependencyCheck
options.description: Skips the check for resource dependencies. Only found resources are installed. No resources of the found resource are installed.

options.name: -TemporaryPath
options.description: Specifies the path to temporarily install the resource before actual installation. If no temporary path is provided, the resource is temporarily installed in the current user's temporary folder.

options.name: -TrustRepository
options.description: Suppress prompts to trust repository. The prompt to trust repository only occurs if the repository isn't configured as trusted.

options.name: -Version
options.description: Specifies the version of the resource to be returned. The value can be an exact version or a version range using the NuGet versioning syntax.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet isn't run.

description: Installs resources from a registered repository.
